lea:title: The Pitch Science Fiction 1Q2026
lea:author: Eduard Pech
lea:description: The Pitch Science Fiction is a quarterly publication of science fiction stories by various authors, covering diverse themes. Included in this issue: Table Of Contents Plain
lea:rights: All stories are in the public domain in the USA. All content not marked public domain are (C) 2026 by Eduard Pech. The complete edition is (C) 2026 by Logophilia. Logophilia is an imprint of Logophilia OÜ.
lea:text: Accept No Substitutes by Robert Sheckley.xhtml
The Misplaced Battleship by Harry Harrison.xhtml
And the Gods Laughed by Fredric Brown.xhtml
The Ego Machine by Henry Kuttner.xhtml
The Call from Beyond by Clifford D. Simak.xhtml
The Creatures That Time Forgot by Ray Bradbury.xhtml
Masters of Space by E. E. Smith and E. Everett Evans.xhtml
Old Rambling House by Frank Herbert.xhtml
Piper in the Woods by Philip K. Dick.xhtml

lea:contributor.roles: edt bkp bkd tyg mrk pfr cov ill art blw
